## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature and how it should work.

## Clinical Motivation
How does this improve surgical planning or clinical outcomes?

- [ ] API
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] ML Training
- [ ] Infrastructure

## Phase

- [ ] Phase 2 (Custom Models)
- [ ] Phase 3 (Production)

- [ ]

## Technical Notes
Any relevant technical considerations, dependencies, or constraints.

## References
Links to papers, competitor features, or clinical guidelines.
